response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed continuous Minecraft gameplay throughout the video. 2. Identified the background music as instrumental Minecraft soundtrack. 3. Evaluated the performer's singing/chanting (e.g., 'peko peko stone'), concluding it is improvisational catchphrase usage and not a pre-recorded vocal song. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for the entire segment.
response.global_summary: The video features a VTuber, Takane Lui, playing Minecraft in an underground mine. She hums, comments on the game, and chants catchphrases over the instrumental background music. No pre-recorded vocal songs are performed during this segment.

scenes.description: The VTuber, Takane Lui, plays Minecraft in an underground mine. She hums, comments on the game, and chants catchphrases to the instrumental background music.
